onstart:
set -e
mkdir -p /root/.ssh /run/sshd /workspace
printf '%s
' 'c3NoLWVkMjU1MTkgQUFBQUMzTnphQzFsWkRJMU5URTVBQUFBSUs0SmEwZWE4Uk4vMDBZYkdsbWI4cGwvancyZEdEdzYyVjhhQ1dtdDZkK2cgcnVucG9kCg==' | base64 -d > /root/.ssh/authorized_keys
chmod 700 /root/.ssh
chmod 600 /root/.ssh/authorized_keys
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y openssh-server git curl ca-certificates build-essential pkg-config libssl-dev python3 python3-venv python3-pip jq rsync tmux xz-utils cmake
/usr/sbin/sshd
sleep infinity
